---
title: "The Brook by the Way: A Text and Prayer for Every Day in the Year"
---

## The Brook by the Way: A Text and Prayer for Every Day in the Year

**Author:** Alice Grubbe
**Date:** 1867
**Imprint:** London: RTS

### Notes

This book was published anonymously.  However, on the authority of CMY\'s reference to it, it can be attributed to Alice Mackenzie (b. 1823), sixth and youngest sister of the Rt. Rev. Charles Frederick Mackenzie, who married (1861) the Reverend Charles Grubbe.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
